message:
fix(combinator): correct CAS ordering in circuit breaker probe slot acquisition

The compare_exchange_weak for acquiring a probe slot in the HalfOpen
state used Acquire/Acquire ordering instead of Release/Acquire, which
is inconsistent with all other CAS operations in the same file and
could prevent state transitions from being visible to other threads
loading with Acquire ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
